title: Blueno Blocks the Path
description: The Straw Hats and their allies launch their attack through Enies Lobby’s front defenses.
scene: Across pages 17, 20, 21, this part follows Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Sanji, Chopper. The Straw Hats and their allies launch their attack through Enies Lobby’s front defenses.
summary: The Straw Hats and their allies launch their attack through Enies Lobby’s front defenses.
